subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant, your letter concerning those two respected souls and their deliverance has been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه ای که در خصوص دو نفس محترم و خلاصی آنان مرقوم نموده
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @travels to Egypt by Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
